VideoHeroCase1.title: Create Stunning Videos with LTX 2.3
VideoHeroCase1.subtitle: Next-Gen AI Video Generation: Text to Video, Image to Video, and More. Transform your ideas into cinematic visuals in seconds.

KeyFeatureCase1.sectionTitle: Why GPT Image 2 Is Different From Every AI Image Tool You've Tried
KeyFeatureCase1.subtitle: Whether you are a designer, marketer, or solo creator, GPT Image 2 delivers a practical feature set that is powerful and easy to use.

items.title: Perfect Text Inside Images
items.text: Every other AI image model treats text as an afterthought. Signs come out garbled. Posters look like ransom notes. GPT Image 2 was rebuilt from scratch to render readable, properly placed text on the first try - headlines, buttons, labels, and even mixed-language layouts.
items.bestFor: Best for: Event posters, product banners, social graphics, UI wireframes, promotional materials.

items.title: Reasoning Before Generating
items.text: GPT Image 2 does not just match your words to pixels. It reasons through your request: understanding spatial relationships, planning the composition, and verifying accuracy before the first pixel renders. Ask it to generate a poster for a current event and it will look up the details in real time.
items.bestFor: Best for: Storytelling, product visualization, scene construction, character design.

items.title: Multilingual Visual Content
items.text: Working across global markets? GPT Image 2 natively supports Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Hindi, Bengali, and all Latin-script languages - rendered correctly inside images, not translated after the fact. Build one visual campaign that works everywhere.
items.bestFor: Best for: Graphic novel artists, UX storyboarders, brand campaign creators.

items.title: Production-Ready Resolution
items.text: Generate high-resolution visuals for posters, thumbnails, UI mockups, and product concepts. Paid plans may include higher-resolution export or upscaling options depending on availability. No watermarks. Outputs are royalty-free and cleared for commercial use under OpenAI's content policy.
items.bestFor: Best for: Teams testing multiple creative directions quickly.

items.title: Image-to-Image Editing
items.text: Upload any reference photo and describe what you want to change. GPT Image 2 edits with surgical precision - swap backgrounds, change colors, localize designs, or remove objects while preserving everything else exactly as-is.
items.bestFor: Best for: Concept prototyping, fast ideation, and creative exploration loops.
